_doc: Phase 2 deployment: V2 LEFT swaps to Kathi-exclusive identity. Loop expanded from 40s to 50s (5 slots × 10s) to use all 5 Kathi creatives + maximize total inventory utilization. V1, V3, V4 retain Phase 1 architecture, each gains 1 new slot for previously-reserved combos. 20 of 21 creatives in active scene; 1 reserved (S_C2 single static).
_inventory_used: 20 of 21 — full library minus c2_ghee_dal_kabab_static_v3 (held for daypart scenes)

_psychology.loop_duration: 50s — slightly slower cycle than Phase 1's 40s; trades pace for variety and full inventory utilization
_psychology.v2_role_change: FROM combo entry/anchor → Kathi-exclusive (₹90 anchor, both K1 + KT cinemagraphs, K1 vs KT pair card)
_psychology.motion_intensity: 8 motions per 50s loop (was 6 per 40s in Phase 1) — denser, more engaging rhythm
_psychology.v1_5th_slot: S_C1 ₹149 — 'value pop' on the hero TV; reminds customer the price-floor exists even on the recommended-dish screen
_psychology.v3_5th_slot: S_VegPair — broadens premium TV's range, anchors at the bottom of the price ladder
_psychology.v4_5th_slot: V_C2 motion — Ghee+Dal+Kabab in motion at counter, visually appetizing close before order

name: psychology_v3_kathi
description: Phase 2 — V2 LEFT switches to Kathi-exclusive (5 Kathi creatives, all used). 5 slots × 10s = 50s loop. V1/V3/V4 each gain a 5th slot for previously-reserved combos. 20 of 21 creatives in active scene.
